text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Grrraaah! I'm getting an incoming call from the brain cells in my teal matter! They're telling me you're the culprit!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hwah! What is this all about?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Don't you know? I'm the great Detective Golshi!
And I know you're behind this. The evidence lines
up!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You're a d-detective?! Um, did something bad
happen?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hm? That doesn't sound like something the
culprit would say... My bad! Sorry for turning the
heat up.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: If you were the culprit, you would've let something slip about this lethal clothespin here!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I see! So that's how you'll find the culprit! But
I promise you, it's not me!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Great Golshi! Would you allow me to help you
find them?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I want to find the true criminal! Villains should
never go unpunished!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You got promise in yer eyes there, kid. Right,
then! I'll make you my assistant! Let's hit the crime
scene for clues!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Okay! I won't let you down!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Ka-zing! That's it! I've cracked the case! The
culprit was looking for some fishcakes!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
But is it even possible to make a getaway with
fishcakes in your mouth while dribbling
backwards?!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I've done plenty of analyzing, and this is the only
plausible answer I can think of!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Let me try to replicate their actions! Please wait
here and observe!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
...Try what now? Are you being serious? Just slow
down a minute!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'll stuff a fesh cake im my mouf... and den rum at
full shpeeeed!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: S-Satonoooo!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... I did it! I busted their little scheme!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Sh-she really pulled it off! She's one mad Horsegirl!
